case_title: 50 LYON STREET ENTERPRISES LLC, VS. SIMON STREET AKA SYMEO STREETER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 50 LYON STREET ENTERPRISES LLC, A  CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMON STREETER AKA SYMEO STREETER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: GARAGE AT 50 LYON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON STREETER AKA SYMEO STREETER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 50 LYON STREET ENTERPRISES LLC, A  CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON STREETER AKA SYMEO STREETER DOES 1 TO 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON STREETER AKA SYMEO STREETER
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON STREETER AKA SYMEO STREETER

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 50 LYON STREET ENTERPRISES LLC, A  CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED AUG-11-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON STREETER AKA SYMEO STREETER
